title: Smokey Italian Sausage and Poppy Focaccia
description: A flavorful Italian dish featuring smoky sausage, crispy focaccia, and a sprinkle of poppy seeds.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince and mix with olive oil

instructions: Slice the focaccia into 1-inch thick slices.
Place the focaccia slices on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil, sprinkle with minced garlic, and season with salt.
Cook in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy.
While the focaccia is cooking, grill the Italian sausage until browned and cooked through.
Slice the cooked sausage into thick rounds.
Once the focaccia is done, top each slice with a slice of sausage and a sprinkle of poppy seeds.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
